title: More Carpets
body:
# More Carpets

## Adds over 50 new carpet blocks!

- Functional Carpets 
  - Functional carpets are carpet blocks that can be waterlogged and provide insulation from the block surface below
  - Magma Carpet (Makes downward bubble column, Damages entities above)
  - Soul Sand Carpet (Makes upward bubble column, Works with soul speed)
  - Soul Soil Carpet (Works with soul speed) 
  - Honey Carpet (is sticky)
  - Slime Carpet (is bouncy)
  - Ice & Packed ice Carpet (is Slippery)
- Rotational Carpets of:
  - All Log Blocks
  - All Stripped Log Blocks 
  - All Plank Blocks
  - All Mushroom Blocks
- Carpet Blocks:
  - All Leaf Blocks
  - Hay Carpet
  - Grass Carpet
  - Podzol Carpet
  - Mycelium Carpet
